productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Arena Black Formal Shoes
description: Classy, stylish and uber cool, these formal slip ons with a pointed toe design from buckaroo are a must have in every suave man's collection. Since they have no laces, you can get into and out of them with utmost ease.Made from high quality leather, they are comfortable enough to be worn all day long. If you want to look awesome and feel great, they are your best bet. When it's time for power dressing, it's time to wear these shoes!UpperFull grain leather upper, for added durability and stylePointed toe design for increased styleLeather wrap-around overlay along the heel and midfoot for better supportHidden elastic gores on either side for a more versatile FitLaceless design for easy removal and wearing of shoesLightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fitBrand badge on the midfootMidsoleEVA midsole with shock absorbers for lightweight comfortWell-cushioned footbed for all-day comfortLeather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dryOutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorptionTextured patterns on the forefoot and hell for improved gripRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
